name: @allurereport/report-app
description: Allure report app: launches list and report UI (API mode)

scripts.prebuild: yarn workspace @allurereport/web-commons run build && yarn workspace @allurereport/web-components run build && yarn workspace @allurereport/web-awesome run build:prod:multi
scripts.prebuild:dev: yarn workspace @allurereport/web-commons run build && yarn workspace @allurereport/web-components run build && yarn workspace @allurereport/web-awesome run build:dev:multi
